description: Facilitator fallback build contract for recreating a facilitator-only rescue environment without changing the student hands-on path.

automatedChecks.description: Operative solution exists in the target facilitator environment.
automatedChecks.fetchXml: <fetch aggregate='true'><entity name='solution'><attribute name='solutionid' alias='recordcount' aggregate='count' /><filter><condition attribute='uniquename' operator='eq' value='Operative' /></filter></entity></fetch>
automatedChecks.successMessage: Operative solution is present in the facilitator fallback environment.
automatedChecks.failureMessage: Operative solution was not found. Rebuild from the gold source or re-import the Operative package before relying on this environment.

automatedChecks.description: Hiring Hub job roles were copied into Dataverse.
automatedChecks.successMessage: Hiring Hub job roles are present.
automatedChecks.failureMessage: No Hiring Hub job roles were found. Lab 13 fallback data is incomplete.

automatedChecks.description: Hiring Hub evaluation criteria were copied into Dataverse.
automatedChecks.successMessage: Hiring Hub evaluation criteria are present.
automatedChecks.failureMessage: No Hiring Hub evaluation criteria were found. Lab 13 fallback data is incomplete.

automatedChecks.description: Sample candidates were copied into Dataverse.
automatedChecks.failureMessage: No candidate records were found. The facilitator fallback environment is missing Day 2 sample data.

automatedChecks.description: Sample resumes were copied into Dataverse.
automatedChecks.failureMessage: No resume records were found. Labs 16, 19, and 21 fallback state will be incomplete.

automatedChecks.description: Sample job applications were copied into Dataverse.
automatedChecks.failureMessage: No job application records were found. Hiring Hub fallback demos are incomplete.

labs.title: Environment Setup
labs.validationSummary: Shared tenant, auth, and environment readiness remain part of the standard StudentReady pass.
manualChecks: Open Copilot Studio and confirm the facilitator can reach the intended workshop environment without extra setup prompts.

labs.title: Intro to Agents
labs.validationSummary: This lab is conceptual and depends on the facilitator being able to open the product surfaces.
manualChecks: Open the home page and confirm the facilitator account can create or open agents.

labs.title: Copilot Studio Fundamentals
labs.validationSummary: The completed fallback environment should still let the facilitator navigate the core authoring surfaces.
manualChecks: Confirm the unified activity and transcript view opens in a fresh test session.

labs.title: Declarative Agents
labs.validationSummary: Fallback proof is the ability to demonstrate the authoring surface, not a copied student artifact.
manualChecks: Open a starter or declarative agent flow and confirm the facilitator can demo the authoring choices.

labs.title: Solutions
labs.validationSummary: The copied environment should still expose the intended solution container and components.
manualChecks: Open Solutions and confirm the facilitator can reach the workshop solution and its components.

labs.title: Prebuilt Agents
labs.validationSummary: Prebuilt-agent coverage remains a facilitator walkthrough rather than a copied dataset.
manualChecks: Confirm the facilitator can open the prebuilt-agent gallery or equivalent current GA entry point.

labs.title: Custom Agent
labs.validationSummary: The copied environment should preserve a working facilitator-owned Contoso Helpdesk Agent.
manualChecks: Open Contoso Helpdesk Agent and confirm it loads successfully in Copilot Studio.

labs.title: Topics and Triggers
labs.validationSummary: Topics are environment content and should survive the gold-source copy.
manualChecks: Open the facilitator-owned Day 1 agent and confirm at least one custom topic is present.

labs.title: Adaptive Cards
labs.validationSummary: Card-based prompts should remain intact in the copied agent.
manualChecks: Open the relevant topic and confirm the adaptive card surface still renders as expected.

labs.title: Agent Flows
labs.buildPath: Gold source environment full copy plus connection repair as needed
labs.validationSummary: Agent flows often depend on connection references and should be validated interactively.
manualChecks: Open a facilitator-owned flow-backed action and confirm there are no broken connection prompts.

labs.title: Event Triggers
labs.buildPath: Gold source environment full copy plus SharePoint trigger verification
labs.validationSummary: Trigger wiring is environment-bound and needs a live facilitator check.
manualChecks: Confirm the trigger opens and still references the intended SharePoint event source.

labs.title: Publish Agent
labs.validationSummary: Publishing readiness depends on current tenant permissions and should remain an explicit facilitator check.
manualChecks: Confirm the publish surface opens for the facilitator-owned agent.

labs.title: Licensing
labs.validationSummary: Credit allocation remains an operator-controlled readiness gate, not a copied artifact.
manualChecks: Confirm the fallback environment can return a response in the test pane without a capacity error.

labs.title: Hiring Agent Setup
labs.artifactType: Operative solution and Hiring Hub seed data
labs.validationSummary: This is the first fully automated fallback proof: Operative plus the base Hiring Hub data must exist in Dataverse.
manualChecks: Open Hiring Hub and confirm the copied records are visible in the app.
Open Hiring Agent and confirm it loads without missing-connection prompts.

labs.title: Agent Instructions
labs.validationSummary: Instructions are facilitator-owned agent content and should copy cleanly with the environment.
manualChecks: Open Hiring Agent instructions and confirm the facilitator-owned guidance is present.

labs.title: Multi-Agent Hiring Team
labs.buildPath: Gold source environment full copy plus post-copy agent link validation
labs.validationSummary: Agent-to-agent references should be validated after every rebuild because they are environment content with downstream dependencies.
manualChecks: Confirm the Hiring Agent still references the expected supporting agents and routing paths.

labs.title: Trigger Automation
labs.buildPath: Gold source environment full copy plus SharePoint/flow repair as needed
labs.validationSummary: This lab depends on SharePoint triggers and should always receive a live facilitator smoke test.
manualChecks: Confirm the resume-processing trigger still opens with valid connection references and target library paths.

labs.title: Model Selection
labs.validationSummary: Model availability can drift by region, so this remains a facilitator spot-check after copy.
manualChecks: Open the model picker and confirm the intended default model or GA fallback is still available.

labs.title: Content Moderation
labs.validationSummary: Moderation settings should persist with the copied agent configuration.
manualChecks: Confirm the per-prompt moderation slider still reflects the intended facilitator setting.

labs.title: Multimodal Prompts
labs.validationSummary: Multimodal prompts should travel with the copied facilitator-owned agent state.
manualChecks: Open the multimodal prompt and confirm its prompt body and attachment expectations are still present.

labs.title: Dataverse Grounding
labs.validationSummary: Dataverse grounding is validated through the copied Hiring Hub data plus a live facilitator check in the agent.
manualChecks: Run a grounded Hiring Agent test and confirm it can reference the copied Hiring Hub data.

labs.title: Document Generation
labs.artifactType: Offer letter flow and template wiring
labs.buildPath: Gold source environment full copy plus document-template verification
labs.validationSummary: Template paths and flow connections can drift after copy, so this remains a facilitator smoke test.
manualChecks: Confirm the offer-letter flow and Word template still open without broken references.

labs.title: MCP Integration
labs.validationSummary: MCP remains a consent-bound, facilitator-owned validation step even in the fallback environment.
manualChecks: Open the MCP onboarding wizard and confirm the facilitator account can reach the supported Microsoft 365 server flow.

labs.title: User Feedback
labs.validationSummary: Feedback topics and cards should persist with the copied facilitator-owned agent.
manualChecks: Confirm the custom feedback experience is still present in the facilitator fallback agent.

labs.title: Agent Evaluation
labs.buildPath: Gold source environment full copy plus manual evaluation rerun as needed
labs.validationSummary: Evaluation runs are still best validated interactively because results are environment and time bound.
manualChecks: Open Evaluation and confirm the facilitator can create or rerun a test set against the rebuilt environment.
